graph.cross_sheet_notes: Sheet 5 (Blatt 5 von 1706) 'PLC overview' of Sensor Control Unit 2 (+SCU.2, =LA2), drawing 31971. Beckhoff EtherCAT node: BK1100 coupler (-5/A100) with terminals -5/A101 EL2008, A102/A103 EL1008, A104 EL3204 (PT100), A105/A106 EL1722 (230VAC DI), A107 EL9011 end terminal. Two Metz Connect converters -5/U1 (SCU1, ETH In, -W5445) and -5/U2 (SCU3, ETH Out, -W5473 LAN outdoor). Supply cross-refs: 24V<-4.4/X24V.3, 0V<-4.6/X0V.3, PE<-3.2/PE.5DA0. All entities proposed/unverified.
